requirements.task_name: Buy two different size M band T-shirts under $30 each and open the cart
requirements.task_description: Navigate the merch store, filter for size M T-shirts under $30, select the two cheapest distinct options, and open the cart page with both items added.

requirements.task_name: Play the most recent music video released after January 1, 2023 and add it to Favorites
requirements.task_description: Find the latest music video released on or after 2023-01-01, start playback, and add that video to a Favorites playlist.

requirements.task_name: Create a 'Workout Mix' playlist with 5 songs (3–5 minutes) from at least 3 different albums
requirements.task_description: Build a new playlist named 'Workout Mix' containing exactly 5 tracks, each between 3 and 5 minutes long, with at least one track from each of the first three albums in the discography.

requirements.task_name: Select two second-cheapest tickets for a Los Angeles show in August 2025 and go to checkout
requirements.task_description: Find a Los Angeles tour date in August 2025, choose the second-cheapest ticket type available, select quantity 2, and proceed to the cart or checkout page.

requirements.task_name: Buy the digital version of 'Midnight Echoes' with the most tracks under $20
requirements.task_description: Compare the standard and deluxe editions of the 'Midnight Echoes' album and add the digital edition with more tracks to the cart, as long as its price is $20 or less; otherwise add the standard edition.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the band newsletter with weekly updates on tours, releases, and merch
requirements.task_description: Fill out the newsletter form using a sample email address, select at least three specific interest categories, and set the subscription frequency to weekly.

requirements.task_name: Save three 2024 'Tour Diary' blog posts and open one from your reading list
requirements.task_description: Filter the band’s blog for 'Tour Diary' posts from 2024, save the first three posts to a reading list or bookmarks, and then open one of the saved posts from that list.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully resolving an article in getArticleDetail(articleId), if (a) that article has status 'published', (b) its tags include a value that slugifies (via _slugifyTag) to 'tour_diary', (c) its publishedAt year is 2024, and (d) reading_list_items contains an entry whose readingListId matches the default reading list id from _getOrCreateDefaultReadingList() and whose articleId equals the requested articleId.
required_variables.reason: This records that the user opened a 2024 'Tour Diary' article that is already saved in the default reading list, allowing the evaluator to verify the 'open one from your reading list' requirement by cross-checking the articleId against articles and reading_list_items.

requirements.task_name: Build a vinyl + hoodie bundle under $100 and review it in the cart
requirements.task_description: Add one vinyl record priced at $40 or less and one hoodie priced at $60 or less to the cart, adjusting the hoodie choice if needed so that the cart subtotal does not exceed $100.
